title: senecio manguensis
intro: Senecio manguensis, also known as Makaku, is a plant species native to the Canary Islands and is part of the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Senecio manguensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
